text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Adult Out of Home Respite Care * Autism Spectrum Disorder 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on autism resources, respite evenings for caregivers (“Take a Break on ASO”), and autism-friendly community events. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 240 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Office: Friday 11am-2pm or by appointment Email (503) 636-1676 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES
